homePage.whySubtitle: We are passionate beekeepers who care about quality, sustainability and your health.
homePage.naturalDesc: No additives, no preservatives. Just pure honey as nature intended.
homePage.sustainableDesc: We practice responsible beekeeping that respects bees and the environment.
homePage.qualityDesc: Every batch is tested and approved to meet the highest quality standards.

about.heroSubtitle: For over 15 years, we have been cultivating bees with love and dedication in the hills of Călărași, Moldova.
about.storyTitle: A Family Born from Passion for Bees
about.storyQuote: Every jar of honey contains the work of thousands of bees and the love of our family.
about.storyBody1: Melisfera was founded in 2009 by a family of beekeeping enthusiasts from Călărași, Moldova. What started as a small hobby with just a few hives has grown into a thriving apiary of over 80 hives.
about.storyBody2: We believe that true honey must be pure, natural and full of flavor. That's why we never rush the process — we let nature take its course and harvest only at the perfect moment.

natural.title: 100% Natural
natural.desc: No additives, no preservatives, no heating above 40°C. Just pure honey as nature made it.

sustainable.title: Sustainable Beekeeping
sustainable.desc: We care for our bees as family members, practicing responsible methods that protect the ecosystem.

quality.title: Guaranteed Quality
quality.desc: Each batch is carefully extracted, filtered and tested to meet the highest quality standards.

about.natureSubtitle: Our bees feed on wildflowers, linden trees and acacia blossoms from the hills of Călărași.
about.quote: The bees do not deceive. The honey reflects the soul of the land where it was born.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions or want to place a special order? We are here for you.
